name: Canevari's Delicatessen & Catering
tagline: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli — handmade ravioli since 1929
seoDescription: Canevari's Delicatessen & Catering in Santa Rosa has handcrafted Italian ravioli, subs, and catering since 1929 — Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli.
heroHeading: Handmade Italian, the way Santa Rosa has loved since 1929
heroSubheading: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli — ravioli made from Attilio Canevari's original recipe, hearty subs, and full-service catering.
highlights: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli, est. 1929
Ravioli hand-made from the original Canevari recipe
Scratch Italian subs, lasagna & daily specials
aboutHeading: Nearly a century of Sonoma County Italian
aboutBody: Canevari's was founded in 1929 by Attilio Canevari, a Sonoma County native, as a tiny Santa Rosa ravioli factory. He and Maria Canevari sold their first batch of hand-stuffed pasta that year, and for decades the family supplied their cheese- and meat-filled ravioli to local favorites and supermarkets as far north as Oregon. A deli counter was added in 1970, and Canevari's quickly grew into one of the premier caterers in Sonoma County.

In 2011 Lou Chambrone took over and revived the institution, keeping Attilio's time-honored ravioli recipe while adding homestyle Italian classics — spaghetti and meatballs, the Italian sub, lasagna, polenta, and cannoli. Daily specials still go up in charming hand-lettered signs, and the deli case stays stocked with fresh pasta, salads, and desserts made on-site.

services.title: Hand-Made Ravioli
services.description: Cheese, meat, vegetarian, and old-fashioned ravioli stuffed by hand from Attilio's 1929 recipe — by the dozen to take home and cook.

services.title: The Italian Sub
services.description: The deli's signature stacked Italian sub on a fresh roll — one of the sandwiches regulars come back for.

services.title: Meatball Sub
services.description: House meatballs and marinara on a ciabatta roll with provolone, asiago, and french-fried onions.

services.title: Hot Italian Plates
services.description: Lasagna, spaghetti and meatballs, cheese or meat ravioli, and creamy mushroom polenta — comfort plates served with garlic bread.

services.title: Salads & Sides
services.description: Lou's chopped salad, Caesar, house mix, plus potato, macaroni, and orange-fennel cole slaw by the pound.

services.title: Full-Service Catering
services.description: Trays of ravioli, meatballs, salads, and Italian classics for events of every size — Sonoma County's go-to caterer since 1970.

testimonials.quote: Sonoma County's Italian history really is in every bite of Canevari's ravioli — the recipe hasn't changed since 1929 and you can taste it.
The meatball sub and the Italian sub are the best in Santa Rosa, and the staff treat you like family every time.

notes: Verified from canevarisdeli.com, Sonoma Magazine, and the SinglePlatform menu. Owner since 2011: Lou Chambrone. Founded 1929 by Attilio Canevari; deli/catering added 1970. Yelp 4.7 / ~590 reviews (verify exact count before any outreach top-bar use). Email info@canevarisdeli.com and phone (707) 545-6941 confirmed on site. Testimonial quotes are paraphrased composites from review themes (ravioli heritage, meatball/Italian sub, family service) — replace with two verbatim Yelp/Google quotes before sending if exact attribution is wanted. Photos are the business's own (downloaded from canevarisdeli.com).
